infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: PurePedal needs your location to show AQI at your position and suggest clean air routes.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: PurePedal tracks your location in the background to record your cycling route and monitor air quality during your ride.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: PurePedal uses motion data to improve ride tracking accuracy.
